title: cereus johnstonii
intro: Cereus johnstonii, also known as Johnston's Pincushion, is a species of cactus that belongs to the Cactaceae family. Native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Cereus johnstonii include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of various skin conditions, such as burns and ulcers. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
